data.mdl_comment:
Introduction ------------
This module contains the DocuSign © SDK:
- with all JAR dependencies in a single zipped external shared-script - it is required during the signature process of **Legal document** feature
See shared script `docusign`.
Import ------
To import this module:
- Create a module named `DocuSignLibs` - Set the settings as:
```json { "type": "git", "branch": "v7", "origin": { "uri": "https://github.com/simplicitesoftware/module-docusign-libs.git" } } ```
- Click on the _Import module_ button
